page.title: Template:Century name from decade or year

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Century name from decade or year]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Century name from decade or year]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Century_name_from_decade_or_year here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Century_name_from_decade_or_year for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly><!-- # First check whether this is a year or a decade: YYYY or YYY0s # No regexes, so check separately for "YYYY" and "YYY0s" # In each case, the find function returns 0 for a nomatch, and 1 for a match, # so we add the two together and take a total of 0 as an error -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%d%s*$|plain=false}} + <!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?0s%s*$|plain=false}} }}<!-- -->|0<!-- -->|<!-- # Doesn't match, so do nothing unless the "nomatch" parameter is set -->{{#if: {{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->|{{{nomatch|}}}<!-- -->}}<!-- -->|<!-- # We have a match # Years and decades need different calculations -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{{1|}}}|^%s*%d?%d?%d?%ds%s*$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a year -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{{1|}}} - 1) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->|<!-- # It's a decade -->{{Ordinal|{{#expr: 1 + floor(({{#invoke:String|replace|{{{1|}}}|^%s*(%d?%d?%d?0)s%s*$|%1|1|false}} + 5) / 100)}}}}<!-- -->}}<!--
# Now use a dash if the "dash" parameter is set to yes, true, or 1 -->{{#ifeq: {{{2|}}}|dash<!-- -->|-<!-- Dash -->| <!-- Space -->}}<!-- -->century<!-- -->}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
